title: Chern-Simons Level Must Be an Integer
summary: Because the path-integral phase only requires the action mod 2pi, the coefficient of I_CS must be integral in a microscopic theory with properly quantized charge; source anchor: Lecture Two / Quantization Of The Chern-Simons Coupling (lines 1352-1367).
assumptions: Scope: microscopic gauge invariance with properly quantized electric charge.
regime: Promoted from AITP topic witten-topological-phases-1510-07698-full-paper via candidate candidate:chern-simons-level-is-integer after passing the documented AI coverage and consensus gate.
scope: Is the integer-level quantization statement for the abelian Chern-Simons response ready to be stored as a reusable theorem_card?

math_expressions.label: unitf
math_expressions.context: Unit Dirac flux through the spatial two-sphere.

math_expressions.label: nif

math_expressions.label: nifty

math_expressions.label: prif
math_expressions.context: Large gauge transformation shifting the holonomy variable.
Gauge invariance of e^{ik I_{\mathrm{CS}}} under the large gauge shift forces integrality of the level.
